description: The Current Account balance is the trade balance plus net factor income.

description: Central Bank Policy Rate is the rate that is used by central bank to implement or signal its monetary policy stance.
label: Central bank policy rate

description: Consumption refers to the total spending on goods.

description: Consumption refers to the total spending on goods.
label: Final consumption

description: Consumer Price Index is an economic indicator that measures the change over time of the prices of consumer goods and services acquired by households.
label: Consumer price index

description: Deflator represents a statistical tool used to adjust GDP from nominal to constant prices.
label: GDP deflator

description: Exports of goods and services represent the value of all goods and other market services provided to the rest of the world.

description: Gross Fixed Capital Formation is measured by the total value of a producer's acquisitions, less disposals of fixed assets during the accounting period, plus certain additions to the value of non-produced assets.
label: Gross fixed capital formation in USD

description: Gross Fixed Capital Formation is measured by the total value of a producer's acquisitions, less disposals of fixed assets during the accounting period, plus certain additions to the value of non-produced assets.
label: Gross fixed capital formation

description: Gross Fixed Capital Formation is measured by the total value of a producer's acquisitions, less disposals of fixed assets during the accounting period, plus certain additions to the value of non-produced assets.

description: House Prices Index measures the rate at which the prices of residential properties are changing over time.
label: House price index

description: Imports of goods and services represent the value of all goods and other market services received from the rest of the world.

description: Inflation is the period-on-period change in the consumer price index.
label: Inflation

description: Long-term Interest Rate. Usually the yield on 10-year government bonds.
label: Long-term interest rate

description: Total currency in circulation.
label: M0

description: Demand deposits in addition to M0.
label: M1

description: Time deposits in addition to M1.
label: M2

description: Largest aggregate and refers to M2 in addition to money market instruments and other securities.
label: M3

description: Largest aggregate and refers to M3 in addition to other long-term financial instruments
label: M4

description: Nominal Gross Domestic Product represents the total value of final goods and services produced within a country at market prices in local currency units.
label: Nominal GDP in USD

description: Nominal Gross Domestic Product represents the total value of final goods and services produced within a country at market prices in local currency units.
label: Nominal GDP

description: Population represents the number of inhabitants of a given area on 1 January of the year in question.
label: Population

description: Real Effective Exchange Rate is A broad summary measure of the prices of one country's goods and services relative to the prices of goods and services in that country's trading partners.
label: Real effective exchange rate

description: Real Gross Domestic Product represents the total value of final goods and services produced within a country at constant prices in local currency units.
label: Real GDP

description: Real Gross Domestic Product Per Capita represents real GDP divided by the population
label: Real GDP per capita

description: Real Gross Domestic Product Per Capita represents real GDP divided by the population
label: Real GDP per capita

description: Real Gross Domestic Product represents the total value of final goods and services produced within a country at constant prices in USD using the atlas method.
label: Real GDP in USD

description: Short-Term Interest Rate. Usually 3 months but less than one year.
label: Short-term interest rate

description: Unemployment Rate is the percentage of the labor force that is looking for a job.
label: Unemployment rate

description: Local currency exchange rate against the United States Dollar.
label: USD exchange rate
